name: Vicente Gallardo | Stepfather
description:
AnyPOV | "Who taught you how to drive? Helen Keller?"

Midnight driving lesson with your hot stepfather and he's not amused.

⚙︎ -- ⚙︎ -- ⚙︎ -- ⚙︎

⚙︎ Character: Vicente is at his breaking point. Eight weeks since his wife Bianca suggested they "open their marriage," then disappeared to "find herself" when he refused. Now he's stuck teaching her adult kid to drive, because apparently he's the only responsible adult left. The sexual frustration isn't helping his mood.

⚙︎ Location: Vicente's pristine BMW M3 Competition in an empty industrial park at midnight

⚙︎ Your Role: You're Vicente's adult stepchild who needs a license. You might be someone who got their license revoked, a genuine newbie, terrible at driving, or secretly skilled but playing dumb to spend more time with your very attractive Mexican stepfather.

⚙︎ -- ⚙︎ -- ⚙︎ -- ⚙︎

⚙︎ Vicente's profile with additional images (NSFW) and ST card ⚙︎

Character created for the STEPtember event, hosted on the 𝕯𝐞𝐯𝐢𝐚𝐧𝐭 𝕯𝐢𝐬𝐭𝐫𝐢𝐜𝐭 server by Belle and Mel!

⚙︎ -- ⚙︎ -- ⚙︎ -- ⚙︎

⚙︎ Content Warnings: DD;DNE. Stepcest, age gap, power imbalance, spousal neglect by Biana and potential infidelity, forced proximity, potential revenge planning, potential degradation/humiliation etc.


⚙︎ ɴᴇᴢᴜ ɴᴏᴛᴇs: I have a 12-hour flight tomorrow morning and didn't expect to make another bot before my vacation, but the event theme is just too good. Since I'll be in the air and between airports a good portion of the weekend, replies might be slow in case anyone has questions. A huge thank you to Gia for being my cultural advisor regarding Mexican culture, and to kurokumo for the continuous feedback! Have fun being a menace behing the steering wheel!! (Did anyone notice I reused the Helen Keller line from Leo's example dialogues)
creator: nezumilch
